texto: Men crawl in slime and wallow in the mud;The Realist groans: "All life is mud ans slime!"Men lie and steal and shed each other's blood;And Realism sees but blood and crime.Yet Right is just as real as Wrong,The mountain peak is real as the ooze,A curse is no more real than a song;Among realities we need but choose.The cynic sees the failure of To-day,The Prophet cries the triumph of To-morrow,Knowing the spirit in our clogging clayThat masters doubt, disaster, loss and sorrow.Failure is but a passing weariness,There is no final answer but Success.
explicacao: Citação de Berton Braley sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Men crawl in slime and wallow in the mud;The Realist groans: "All life is mud ans slime!"Men lie …” articula sucesso, climbers, inspiracional em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e luto.
